FlexiPage.description: Opportunity page for AA Sales Teams from March 2024

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
This message will show until your contract has a status of 'Activated'


Ensure you attach the contract in Salesforce to the files section in the contract record.


This can be found on the left hand side of this record page underneath Account Details.

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Fleet Size & SMR Jobs per Year (This Opportunity)
